The auto card

When a post has no cover photo, the builder draws this 1200x630 card for the link preview. Type a real title and pick the look you want; I will set it as the default. Design A is live now.

A. FramedLive

Gold hairline frame, mono eyebrow, centered serif title.

B. Lower left

Title set to the bottom-left, a small mark up top. No frame.

C. Ruled

Centered title over a short gold rule, eyebrow above.

D. Bare

Just the title, large, on the green. Nothing else.
